name: molcell-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to Molecular Cell (Cell Press) — the flagship journal for mechanistic molecular biology (gene expression, chromatin/epigenetics, RNA biology, DNA replication/repair, signaling, proteostasis, structural mechanism). Encodes Molecular Cell's editorial bar (deep mechanism, not phenomenology, proven by multiple orthogonal approaches with physiological relevance), the Article/Short Article structure, the ~7,000-word / ~7-display-item budget, the signature Cell Press artifacts (Highlights, eTOC/In Brief blurb, Graphical Abstract), the Summary, mandatory STAR Methods with the Key Resources Table and Resource Availability, data/code deposition (GEO/PDB/PRIDE), the Cell Press numbered superscript reference style, submission preflight, and reviewer rebuttals. English-first docs with zh-CN mirror.
